dialogueLines.dialogueText: Well ‘ere whippersnapper! Lookie like we got us a wee of a pickle.
That ol’ coot and her little minions are known to reel in havoc wherever they’s feet touch.
Well, dat ain’t nothing that WE, Gregor and Duke, can’t handle!
Huh? What’s little ol’ me gonna do? Emotional support, of course!
‘Mens sana in corpore sano’ and all that!
Don’t fret! I’ll be gripping that glock with you, in spirit.
Whooo nelly! That first there scrumish was a real sweater! I haven’t fought like that in ages!
What? You didn’t see me? Of course you didn’t!
The best aid comes from an invisible hand…
Even if that hand was backed up in the loo a few doors down.
Geewinklers! That there drilly boy was no match for the Gregor and Duke duo!
Our next fight is against that magic witch and that big groom o’ hers!
Finally, we gonna have ourselves a fair and square 2v2 now!
Even against their fangled magic doohickeys and silly tricks, I’ll still take them down!
.. oh yeah, you can help a wee bit too Duke.
Woo wee! Call them magicians auntie’s fresh chili, because they done got cooked!
...Huh? What was that.. Of course I fought them!
You may do SOME damage with them little bullets of yours…
But the psychic damage dished out from my fetal position done was surely our ace in the hole.
You may fancy one of them special eye doctors in town.
When we fight that their arsonist Ash, you see my heroism in bright lights!
Sonny boy… COUGH … I got sum bad news… I don’t think I can help in the final battle…
That last battle… gravely wound me, and I don’t think I can take alone…
DANG SON LET ME FINISH! THE INJURY WASN’T FROM NO ROCK I TRIPPED ON!
Duke my boy… COUGH COUGH… you must take every … COUGH .. thing I taught you…
-- HUFF .. and face … GWARK … Granny … HURRR… alone…
My boy! My boy! You, I mean, we did it! We saved the whole dang saloon!
I reckon that when dem chips were down, when all hope was lost…
My wise wisdom echoed in your brain and carried you to victory
... Huh? .. How’d I get better so unrealistically fast from my fatal injury…
Well, I reckon I done got blessed by my immaculate immune system.
Until our next duel against evil forces, old sport!
And don’t worry: You getting a BIG shoutout at my Medal O’ Honor speech!
